    "cli": "edq.cli.crypto.encrypt-secret",
    "arguments": [
        "It's a secret!",
        "--iv", "nfhP9KYRTwQyGbwtkEj4FA==",
        "--salt", "bQTHv6sDqIRVbnyFHkwODA==",
        "--encryption-key", "my-key",
    ],
}
---
